idea-plugin.name: RESTful API Search
idea-plugin.description:
RESTful API Search

Quickly search and navigate to Spring REST API endpoints in your project.

✨ Features

  • Quick Launch — Ctrl+\ (macOS: Cmd+\) or Navigate → Search REST API Endpoints
  • Real-time Search — Filter by URL path, HTTP method, or class/method name
  • Segment Matching — Space-separated multi-keyword AND logic with continuous substring matching
  • HTTP Method Filter — Toolbar buttons to filter GET / POST / PUT / DELETE / PATCH / HEAD / OPTIONS
  • Color-coded Methods — Each HTTP method shown in a distinct color
  • Navigate to Source — Press Enter or double-click to jump to source code
  • Pin Popup — Keep the popup open for multiple queries
  • Search History — Cycle through previous searches with Alt+↑ / Alt+↓
  • Annotation Support — Auto-detects @RestController, @Controller and all Mapping annotations

RESTful API 搜索

快速搜索并跳转到 Spring 项目中的 REST API 端点。

✨ 功能特性

  • 一键呼出 — Ctrl+\（macOS: Cmd+\）或 Navigate → Search REST API Endpoints
  • 实时搜索 — 按 URL 路径、HTTP 方法或类名/方法名过滤
  • 分段匹配 — 空格分隔的多关键词 AND 逻辑，支持连续子串匹配
  • 方法过滤 — 工具栏按钮过滤 GET / POST / PUT / DELETE / PATCH / HEAD / OPTIONS
  • 彩色标签 — 每个 HTTP 方法以不同颜色显示
  • 一键跳转 — 按 Enter 或双击跳转到源代码
  • 固定弹窗 — 保持弹窗打开以便多次查询
  • 搜索历史 — 使用 Alt+↑ / Alt+↓ 切换历史搜索
  • 注解支持 — 自动检测 @RestController、@Controller 及所有 Mapping 注解

action.description: Search and navigate to Spring REST API endpoints in the project
